this.reset().resume()}seek(t,s=0,i=0){Oi(this),this.completed=!1;let o=this.paused;return this.paused=!0,le(this,t+this._delay,~~s,~~i,Tt.AUTO),o?this:this.resume()}alternate(){let t=this._reversed,s=this.iterationCount,i=this.iterationDuration,o=s===1/0?ls(ns/i):s;return this._reversed=+(this._alternate&&!(o%2)?t:!t),s===1/0?this.iterationProgress=this._reversed?1-this.iterationProgress:this.iterationProgress:this.seek(i*o-this._currentTime),this.resetTime(),this}play(){return this._reversed&&this.alternate(),this.resume()}reverse(){return this._reversed||this.alternate(),this.resume()}cancel(){return s=this.then,i=()=>{this.then=null,t(this),this.then=s,this._resolve=$};return new Promise(o=>(this._resolve=()=>o(i()),this.completed&&this._resolve(),this))}};function Hs(e){let Map,qi=class{constructor(t){this.element=t,this.useWin=this.element===G.body,this.winWidth=0,this.winHeight=0,this.width=0,this.height=0,this.left=0,this.top=0,this.scale=1,this.zIndex=0,this.scrollX=0,this.scrollY=0,this.prevScrollX=0,this.prevScrollY=0,this.scrollWidth=0,this.scrollHeight=0,this.velocity=0,this.backwardX=!1,this.backwardY=!1,this.scrollTicker=new $t({autoplay:!1,onBegin:()=>this.dataTimer.resume(),onUpdate:()=>{let s=this.backwardX||this.backwardY;W(this,i=>i.handleScroll(),s)},onComplete:()=>this.dataTimer.pause()}).init(),this.dataTimer=new $t({autoplay:!1,frameRate:30,onUpdate:s=>{let i=s.deltaTime,o=this.prevScrollX,n=this.prevScrollY,r=this.scrollX,l=this.scrollY,a=o-r,c=n-l;this.prevScrollX=r,this.prevScrollY=l,a&&(this.backwardX=o>r),c&&(this.backwardY=n>l),this.velocity=B(i>0?Math.sqrt(a*a+c*c)/i:0,5)}}).init(),this.resizeTicker=new speed(t){this._speed=+t,this.forEach(s=>s.playbackRate=t)}get currentTime(){let t=this.controlAnimation,s=V.timeScale;return this.completed?this.duration:t?+t.currentTime*(s===1?1:s):0}set currentTime(t){let s=t*(V.timeScale===1?1:zt);this.forEach(i=>{!this.persist&&s>=this.duration&&i.play(),i.currentTime=s})}get progress(){return this.currentTime/this.duration}set progress(t){this.forEach(s=>s.currentTime=t*this.duration||0)}resume(){return this.paused?(this.paused=!1,this.forEach("play")):this}pause(){return this.paused?this:(this.paused=!0,this.forEach("pause"))}alternate(){return this.reversed=!this.reversed,this.forEach("reverse"),this.paused&&this.forEach("pause"),this}play(){return this.reversed&&this.alternate(),this.resume()}reverse(){return this.reversed||this.alternate(),this.resume()}seek(t,s=!1){return s&&(this.muteCallbacks=!0),t<this.duration&&(this.completed=!1),this.currentTime=t,this.muteCallbacks=!1,this.paused&&this.pause(),this}restart(){return this.completed=!1,this.seek(0,!0).resume()}commitStyles(){return this.forEach("commitStyles")}complete(){return this.seek(this.duration)}cancel(){return this.muteCallbacks=!0,this.commitStyles().forEach("cancel"),this.animations.length=0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.targets.forEach(t=>{t.style.transform==="none"&&t.style.removeProperty("transform")})}),this}revert(){return this.cancel().targets.forEach((t,s)=>{let i=t.style,o=this._inlineStyles[s];for(let n in o){let r=o[n];S(r)||r===Ct?i.removeProperty(Ue(n)):t.style[n]=r}t.getAttribute("style")===Ct&&t.removeAttribute("style")}),this}then(t=$){let s=this.then,i=()=>{this.then=null,t(this),this.then=s,this._resolve=$};return new Promise(o=>(this._resolve=()=>o(i()),this.completed&&this._resolve(),this))}},vn={animate:(e,t)=>new 0,l=`#${n.hash.split("#")[1]}`;this.scrollTo(l,r);return}}if(this.options.stopInertiaOnNavigate&&i.some(r=>o.host===r.host&&o.pathname!==r.pathname)){this.reset();return}};onPointerDown=e=>{e.button===1&&this.reset()};onVirtualScroll=e=>{if(typeof o=i.type.includes("touch"),n=i.type.includes("wheel");this.isTouching=i.type==="touchstart"||i.type==="touchmove";let r=t===0&&s===0;if(this.options.syncTouch&&o&&i.type==="touchstart"&&r&&!this.isStopped&&!this.isLocked){this.reset();return}let a=this.options.gestureOrientation==="vertical"&&s===0||this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&t===0;if(r||a)return;let c=i.composedPath();c=c.slice(0,c.indexOf(this.rootElement));let h=this.options.prevent,f=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical";if(c.find(v=>v instanceof HTMLElement&&(typeof h=="function"&&h?.(v)||v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent")||f==="vertical"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-vertical")||f==="horizontal"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-horizontal")||o&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-touch")||n&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-wheel")||this.options.allowNestedScroll&&this.hasNestedScroll(v,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}))))return;if(this.isStopped||this.isLocked){i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();return}if(!(this.options.syncTouch&&o||this.options.smoothWheel&&n)){this.isScrolling="native",this.animate.stop(),i.lenisStopPropagation=!0;return}let T=s;this.options.gestureOrientation==="both"?T=Math.abs(s)>Math.abs(t)?s:t:this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&(T=t),(!this.options.overscroll||this.options.infinite||this.options.wrapper!==window&&this.limit>0&&(this.animatedScroll>0&&this.animatedScroll<this.limit||this.animatedScroll===0&&s>0||this.animatedScroll===this.limit&&s<0))&&(i.lenisStopPropagation=!0),i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();let y=o&&this.options.syncTouch,p=o&&i.type==="touchend";p&&(T=Math.sign(this.velocity)*Math.abs(this.velocity)**this.options.touchInertiaExponent),this.scrollTo(this.targetScroll+T,{programmatic:!1,...y?{lerp:p?this.options.syncTouchLerp:1}:{lerp:this.options.lerp,duration:this.options.duration,easing:this.options.easing}})};resize(){this.dimensions.resize(),this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.emit()}emit(){this.emitter.emit("scroll",this)}onNativeScroll=()=>{if(this._resetVelocityTimeout!==null&&(clearTimeout(this._resetVelocityTimeout),this._resetVelocityTimeout=null),this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1;return}if(this.isScrolling===!1||this.isScrolling==="native"){let e=this.animatedScroll;this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=this.animatedScroll-e,this.direction=Math.sign(this.animatedScroll-e),this.isStopped||(this.isScrolling="native"),this.emit(),this.velocity!==0&&(this._resetVelocityTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=0,this.isScrolling=!1,this.emit()},400))}};reset(){this.isLocked=!1,this.isScrolling=!1,this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity=0,this.animate.stop()}start(){if(this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.removeProperty("overflow");return}this.internalStart()}}internalStart(){this.isStopped&&(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!1,this.emit())}stop(){if(!this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.setProperty("overflow","clip");return}this.internalStop()}}internalStop(){this.isStopped||(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!0,this.emit())}raf=e=>{let t=e-(this.time||e);this.time=e,this.animate.advance(t*.001),this.options.autoRaf&&(this._rafId=requestAnimationFrame(this.raf))};scrollTo(e,{offset:t=0,immediate:s=!1,lock:i=!1,programmatic:o=!0,lerp:n=o?this.options.lerp:void d=="string"&&["top","left","start","#"].includes(d))d=0;else if(typeof d=="string"&&["bottom","right","end"].includes(d))d=this.limit;else{let y=null;if(typeof p=this.rootElement.getBoundingClientRect();T-=this.isHorizontal?p.left:p.top}let u=y.getBoundingClientRect();d=(this.isHorizontal?u.left:u.top)+this.animatedScroll}}if(typeof Pa=[".content_title",".content_desc p"];function ka(e){let t=e.querySelector(".content_title")?e:document,s=[];return Pa.forEach(i=>{t.querySelectorAll(i).forEach(o=>{o.style.visibility="hidden";let n=He(o,{lines:{wrap:"clip"},words:!0});s.push({split:n,cls:i,el:o})})}),s}function sr(e){e.forEach(({split:i,el:o})=>{i.addEffect(({words:n})=>(o.style.visibility="",Y(n,{y:[{to:["100%","0%"]}],duration:750,ease:"out(3)",delay:be(50,{start:0})})))})}var uo="blur(20px)",ir="blur(0px)",fo=[],Rs=new Set;function Oa(e){let t=Le(.67,0,.27,1);(e.querySelector("img, video")?e:document).querySelectorAll("img:not(.content_next--list img), video:not(.content_next--list video)").forEach(o=>{Y(o,{filter:uo,duration:0});let n=Qe({target:o,repeat:!1,onEnter:()=>{Rs.has(o)||(Rs.add(o),Y(o,{filter:[uo,ir],duration:750,ease:t}))},onEnterBackward:()=>{Rs.has(o)||(Rs.add(o),Y(o,{filter:[uo,ir],duration:750,ease:t}))}});fo.push(n)})}function or(){fo.forEach(e=>e.revert()),fo=[],Rs.clear()}function nr({playSharedIntro:e=!1,content:t=document,pageKey:s="workContent"}={}){let i=ka(t);e?Ae().then(()=>{ue(s),sr(i)}):sr(i),Oa(t);let o=t.querySelector(".content_next--list")?t:document,n=o.querySelectorAll(".content_next--list .content_next--item"),r=n.length;n.forEach((l,a)=>{let c=l.querySelector("a").getAttribute("href");if(window.location.pathname===c){let h=n[(a+1)%r];h.style.display="block"}}),o.querySelectorAll("video").forEach(l=>{l.muted=!0,l.playsInline=!0,l.loop=!0})}var rr=0;console.log("%c Developed by CHRLS DESIGN - https://chrls.design","background: #000; color: #fff; display: block; padding:5px; padding-right: 10px;");function ar(e){let t=e.split("?")[0].toLowerCase().replace(/\/+$/,"")||"/",s=t==="/"?[]:t.split("/").filter(Boolean);return{p:t,segs:s}}function lr(e){return e.length===0||e.length===1&&(e[0]==="index.html"||e[0]==="index.htm")}"scrollRestoration"in history&&(history.scrollRestoration="manual");function cr(){document.querySelector("#time").textContent=new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{timeZone:"Europe/London",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"})}function Da(e){let t=i=>navigator.clipboard.writeText(i),s=e?.getAttribute("data-email")||document.querySelector("[data-email]")?.getAttribute("data-email")||"";s&&t(s)}cr();setInterval(cr,1e3);document.addEventListener("click",e=>{let t=e.target.closest("[data-email]");t&&(e.preventDefault(),Da(t))});var po=class extends me{onLeave({from:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:1},{opacity:0}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}onEnter({to:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:0},{opacity:1}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}},mo=class extends ge{initialLoad(){this.onEnter()}onEnter(){this.content.querySelectorAll("video[autoplay]").forEach(h=>{h.play().catch(()=>{})}),document.body.scrollTop=0,document.documentElement.scrollTop=0,window.scrollTo(0,0),rr+=1;let t=rr===1,{segs:s}=ar(window.location.pathname),i=lr(s),o=s.includes("about"),n=s.indexOf("work"),r=n!==-1&&n<s.length-1,l=n!==-1&&n===s.length-1;i||ho();let a=this.content,c="home";if(o?c="about":r?c="workContent":l&&(c="work"),!t){ue(c);let h=document.querySelector(".main");h&&(h.style.opacity="1",h.style.pointerEvents="auto")}i&&Kn({playSharedIntro:t,content:a,pageKey:c}),o&&Zn({playSharedIntro:t,content:a,pageKey:c}),r?nr({playSharedIntro:t,content:a,pageKey:c}):l&&er({playSharedIntro:t,content:a,pageKey:c})}onLeaveCompleted(){or();let{segs:t}=ar(window.location.pathname);lr(t)||ho()}},Fa=new ze({transitions:{default:po},renderers:{default:mo}});Fa.on("NAVIGATE_END",({to:e})=>{let t=e.pathname;document.querySelectorAll(".nav a, .nav_link").forEach(s=>{s.classList.remove("w--current"),s.getAttribute("href")===t&&s.classList.add("w--current")})});})();
